title: reseda lutea subsp. lutea
intro: Reseda lutea subsp. lutea, also known as Wild Resedawort or Yellow Mignonette, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Resedaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of bronchitis and fever. The health benefits of Reseda lutea subsp. lutea include its potential to reduce inflammation, relieve respiratory issues, and support digestive health, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Reseda lutea subsp. lutea can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or poultice to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for therapeutic purposes.
